steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: ”Henry's careful construction” is a singular subject. The blank requires a verb followed by “apparent,” a predicate adjective.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: ”Becomes” is the 3rd person singular form, which correctly matches the singular subject following the rule of subject-verb agreement (a verb must match its subject in number). The other three options use plural or base forms that don't match. That matches choice C — C is correct.
